title: Create Styled Tempad
description: Create-Styled textures for the Tempad mod!
body:
A Create-Styled Tempad for the [Tempad Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tempad)!

Optionally, if you have a mod that supports CIT textures (CITResewn, Optifine), you can rename a Tempad to "Overgrown Tempad" to get an overgrown version of the texture!
